curated by Maciej Matyjas

  • Connect with me
  • Blog posts

Connect with me

  • LinkedIn - Happy to connect & message folks on LinkedIn
  • GitHub - Portfolio of personal projects and open source contributions
  • MaciejMatyjas.com - HTML version of this page

Blog posts

  • Owning Your CODEOWNERS File - Howto post about the gotchas of CODEOWNERS files.
  • Pros and Cons of GraphQL - Not entirely buying the GraphQL hype in 2018.
  • The Story Behind the Stories - Writing about the editorial process at the Expedia Group blog

Inspiration

  • Mirtha Dermisache - Her work layers the pleasure of writing expressively in a notebook with the potential of decoding musings of ancient and extraterrestrial societies.

APIs

  • OpenAQ - Nonprofit community of air quality sensors and an API to access readings.
  • github/public-apis - Vast directory of APIs.

Tools

  • Jamstack - Massive list of technology for building websites associated with the Jamstack philosophy.

Programming languages

  • Elm - Strongly typed and well designed language (almost a framework) for web application development.
